title: Anti Aliasing Artifact Amendments
description: Fixes artifacting on some blocks from new anti-aliasing.
body:
Minecraft 1.21.11 changed the way block textures are rendered, and without boring you with the details, the long story short is that some blocks look weird now. There are mods to fix this, but this is a resource pack in case you don't want to deal with mods.

![Redstone dust with the pack on versus off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ojlkigz7/images/1c8e6ec644a741a228d5558b87cd06b35afe7376.png)
